blocks.body: Subject Questions shows how to ask about the person or thing that does the action, without do / does / did in the normal pattern.

{ "title": "4. Quick summary", "items": [ "Subject question asks about the person or thing that does the action.", "We usually build it as Who / What + verb + ...?", "In a normal subject question, do / does / did is not needed.", "Who called you? = we do not know who did the action.", "Who did you call? = we do not know who received the action. That is an object question.", "If the wh-word is the subject, the pattern is simpler and closer to a statement." ] }
